title: Overgrown's Origins: Catghost
description: Explore Minecraft as a Catghost! Harness spectral powers, phase through blocks, and see in the dark. A thrilling experience awaits!
body:
## 👻 Catghost Origin: The Spectral Feline 🐱

Welcome to the ethereal realm of the Catghost in Minecraft! This datapack introduces the Ghostcat, a spectral feline that merges the mysteries of the afterlife with the agility of a cat.

**🌊 Aquaphobic:** Beware of water! The Ghostcat dreads it. Drowning happens twice as fast, and swimming is a sluggish affair.

**🐾 Feline Reflexes:** Embrace the agility of a cat! Move swifter and leap higher than most creatures in the Minecraft world.

**🪂 Land On Your Feet:** Falls aren't as scary anymore! Take only half the damage from falls and collisions.

**❤️ Nine Lives:** True to feline legends, you're blessed with just 9 hearts. Guard them well!

**🌌 Nocturnal:** Darkness is no obstacle. Navigate the night with perfect vision, just like a ghostly feline should.

**🐟 Piscivorous:** A cat's gotta eat! But for the Ghostcat, only raw or cooked fish will do.

**🚪 Spirit Walk:** For a brief 15 seconds, become one with the blocks and phase right through them.

Dive into this unique Minecraft experience and let the haunting yet thrilling adventures of the Catghost begin!
